Description: Project Management -- coordination and oversight of service pit structural drawing set production
Notes: PM hours for design kickoff; Owner/Architect coordination on pit geometry; discipline interface management; schedule tracking

Description: Cost Estimator -- quantity takeoff and benchmarking support for service pit drawing set
Notes: Cost estimator support for scope definition and parametric checks

Description: BIM Technician -- structural modeling and drawing production for service pit detail sheets
Notes: BIM/CAD production of 9 drawing sheets (plan; transverse sections; longitudinal section; wall details; floor slab detail; cover system detail; edge condition detail; access detail; penetration schedule)

Description: Structural Engineer -- design analysis; calculation coordination; multi-discipline interface; QA review; P.Eng. stamp
Notes: Core engineering labor: pit geometry confirmation; equipment load derivation; geotech integration; wall design (lateral earth + surcharge + hydrostatic); floor slab design; cover system design; edge conditions; access design; penetration coordination; waterproofing specification; QA review; P.Eng. stamp

Description: Pit Geometry Confirmation -- confirm 24 ft x 100 ft clear dimensions with Owner/Architect
SourceSection: Step 1 -- Confirm Pit Geometry and Program
Notes: Included within ITEM-001 and ITEM-004 hours; listed for scope traceability

Description: Equipment Load Specification -- obtain and derive governing surcharge loads for cover system and pit edges
Notes: Included within ITEM-004 hours; critical prerequisite for cover system design

Description: Geotechnical Integration -- review DEL-008-01 and establish design parameters (bearing; GWT; frost depth; Ka)
Notes: Included within ITEM-004 hours; if geotech TBD at time of design proceed on stated assumptions

Description: Pit Wall Structural Design -- lateral earth pressure; surcharge; hydrostatic; reinforcement detailing
Notes: Included within ITEM-004 hours; walls are reinforced concrete cast-in-place (assumption)

Description: Pit Floor Slab Design -- bearing; drainage slope coordination; sump blockout; waterproofing
SourceSection: Structural System Attributes -- Floor slab of pit
Notes: Included within ITEM-004 hours; drainage slope coordinated with PKG-006

Description: Cover/Grating System Design -- structural design for heavy equipment loading (motor scraper class)
SourceSection: R-002 -- Heavy Equipment Surcharge Loading; R-005 -- Steel Design
Notes: Included within ITEM-004 hours; cover type TBD (grating vs plate vs hinged -- see Guidance T-3)

Description: Edge Condition and Embedded Plate Detail -- pit lip steel angle/plate; transition to floor slab
SourceSection: C-4 -- Steel Plates at Pit Edges
Notes: Included within ITEM-004 hours; coordinates with floor steel plate embedments (App B)

Description: Access Detail (Stair/Ladder) -- structural framing and embedments for pit entry/egress
Notes: Included within ITEM-004 hours; access configuration TBD pending Architect coordination

Description: Waterproofing and Drainage Provisions -- system specification on structural drawings
Notes: Included within ITEM-004 hours; waterproofing extent dependent on geotech GWT findings

Description: Multi-Discipline Penetration Coordination -- blockouts and sleeves for MEP disciplines
Notes: Included within ITEM-001 and ITEM-004 hours; coordination with PKG-003 (Mech); PKG-004 (Elec); PKG-006 (Plumb); PKG-001 (Arch)

Description: Confined Space Compliance Determination -- OH&S classification and documentation
Notes: Included within ITEM-004 hours; may require OH&S consultant coordination

Description: Drawing Set Production -- 9 structural detail sheets per Procedure Step 6 (S-[x].1 through S-[x].9)
Notes: Included within ITEM-003 and ITEM-004 hours; plan + sections + wall details + floor slab + cover + edge + access + penetrations + general notes

Description: Internal QA Review -- completeness against Specification R-001 through R-012; code compliance; coordination check
Notes: Included within ITEM-004 hours; separate line for scope traceability

Description: P.Eng. Stamp and IFC Issue -- review; sign and stamp by licensed Alberta P.Eng.; geotech hold point verification
SourceSection: R-007 -- P.Eng. Stamp Requirement; Procedure Step 8
Notes: Included within ITEM-004 hours; includes geotech hold point (Step 8.3) verification
